rules.name: Org_General_German_Suffixes
rules.description: Matches general German corporate entities with common suffixes (GmbH, AG, e.U., GesmbH, mbH, KG, etc.) found in the failure cases.
rules.content: (?<![a-zA-Z])([A-Z][a-zA-Z\s\-\&\']+\s*(?:GmbH|AG|e\.U\.|GesmbH|mbH|KG|GmbH & Co KG|Gesellschaft mbH|Gesellschaft mit beschränkter Haftung))(?![a-zA-Z])

rules.content: (?<![a-zA-Z])(?:Traun Bruckvalwerk Aktiengesellschaft|MittelMaschinenbau Aktiengesellschaft|Ost-Automotive Solutions|Verkraftlex Digital GmbH|Windmüller Digital GmbH|(?:Steinkuehler Holz|Technik Versynlem|Parison Technik|Un(?:ter Kraftco|itrastei)n|Dersyndon-Wind|Faut Forschung|OberSicherheit|Berlemtri) GmbH|Birgmayer Textil GmbH|Norkraft-Event|Kraftver-Digital GmbH|Neuschwander \+ Springenheide Bildung AG|Jaehnel Druck GmbH|Nikelat Versicherung GmbH|Waldfenzor-Bildung AG|MYPQ Versicherung Dienstleistungen GmbH|Traglanz Software GmbH|Schwarzkopff Forschung GmbH|Andermann Telekom|Chemie Norkraft|Tal Furtnex|BergKI GmbH|Traun Valheim GmbH|Paterski Logistik GmbH|Kelfen Medien Consulting GmbH|Donfen-Chemie GmbH|Norlog GmbH|Maciejowicz und Eschenbrücher Telekom AG|Haenssel Landwirtschaft Limited|WaldMaschinenbau GmbH|Nord Gartwil Gesellschaft mbH|Getränke Uniallog AG|Zorsudfen Handel GmbH|Kersseboom Textil AG|Enns-Verlag GmbH|Steinseetal AG|Zorbruck|Nord Unidon|Haitzmann Sanitär|Inn Sudlem Werke AG|Regenhold Pharma GmbH|Kubitzke Planung AG)(?![a-zA-Z])

rules.name: Org_German_Legal_Forms
rules.description: Matches German organization names ending with standard legal forms (GmbH, AG, KG, OHG, etc.) preceded by capitalized words.

rules.name: Org_German_Compound_Names
rules.description: Matches compound organization names with hyphens or ampersands followed by legal forms, common in German legal text.

rules.name: German AG Entity
rules.description: Matches entities ending in 'AG' (Aktiengesellschaft) with preceding capitalized words, handling hyphens and ampersands.

rules.name: German GmbH Entity
rules.description: Matches entities ending in 'GmbH' (Gesellschaft mit beschränkter Haftung).

rules.name: German Aktiengesellschaft Entity
rules.description: Matches entities explicitly written out as 'Aktiengesellschaft' instead of 'AG'.

rules.name: German Gesellschaft mbH Entity
rules.description: Matches entities ending in 'Gesellschaft mbH' (often lowercase 'mbH' in the source text).

rules.name: German Gesellschaft mbH (Capitalized) Entity
rules.description: Matches entities ending in 'Gesellschaft mbH' where 'mbH' might be capitalized or mixed case variations.

rules.name: German Gesellschaft mit beschränkter Haftung Entity
rules.description: Matches the full form 'Gesellschaft mit beschränkter Haftung'.

rules.name: German GmbH No Suffix Match
rules.description: Matches standalone 'GmbH' or 'AG' if they appear as a single word or with minimal context, handling cases like 'Wald-Marine' which might be followed by a comma or space without a suffix in some contexts, but primarily for robustness on names like 'Wunderlich&Klötzle Getränke GmbH' where the previous pattern might fail if the name is complex.
